input: Run api architecture on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected api architecture output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the api architecture workflow

input: Apply api architecture to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive api architecture analysis with evidence-tagged findings
